input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.5.3
            TITLE: the shoulder harness mounting bar should be loaded only by the shoulder harness

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.5.3: The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar should be loaded only by the Shoulder Harness
F.6.5.3 The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar should be loaded only by the Shoulder Harness  
The Head Restraint, Firewall, driver’s seat and light bodywork may attach to the mounting bar

final_answer: The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar should be loaded only by the Shoulder Harness F.6.5.3 The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar should be loaded only by the Shoulder Harness The Head Restraint, Firewall, driver’s seat and light bodywork may attach to the mounting bar
